title: Establish Work Item Policy and Add Lightweight Problem Intent

sources.reason: Defines the repository's current cockpit workflow and core guidance.
Explains the responsibility model and review-lens framing to update.
Documents the contract schema and requires a new field reference.
Provides agent guidance that should reflect the new review-lens language.
Defines the canonical Work Item Contract example.

riskAssessment.reason: Touches governance docs, contract validation, and example fixtures while keeping backward compatibility.

preReviewWarnings: Review the schema addition for backward compatibility and keep the new guidance concise.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: README.md includes Core Principles, the responsibility model, review lenses, and the schema evaluation rule.

guidelines: Keep the change intentionally small and backward compatible.
Prefer documentation updates over schema expansion unless machine-verifiable evidence is needed.
Do not invent missing product context; use explicit 'not provided' instead.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
